title: Add behavior fixtures for generated skill and plugin targets

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to SkillSpec behavior fixtures and generated target equivalence tests; do not add live third-party agent harnesses or new framework targets.

canonical_core.proof_expectations: ['focused SkillSpec behavior fixture pytest', 'uv run python scripts/generate/generate_skillspec_targets.py --check', 'ruff on touched Python/test files']

Generated skill and plugin outputs expose fixture ids and required semantics without becoming behavior sources.
Tests fail if generated targets omit required skill visibility, next_safe_action semantics, forbidden actions, CLI-preferred execution, or no-CLI fallback behavior.
Dogfooding slash-pair false positive is fixed directly with a planning regression.

execution_run.what happened: Fixed the planning missing-file-reference dogfooding false positive for known conceptual slash pairs such as plugin/adaptor, then implemented #1040 behavior fixtures for generated skill/plugin targets. SkillSpec now carries direct, lane, and no-CLI fallback behavior fixtures; generated skill and Codex plugin targets expose those fixture semantics; tests prove required skill visibility, next_safe_action semantics, forbidden actions, CLI-preferred execution, and no-CLI fallback are preserved.
